tolerance: Stop and reset jig if exceeded
environment: Pine scrap blank; same fixture as production
action: Repeat scrap test before drilling production cherry. See instrument-maker#84 fallback plan.

tolerance: Stop and reset jig if exceeded
action: Linear wander acceptable; sudden step indicates chip pack — retract more often.
Above 0.080 in offset, switch to staged drilling from both ends.

environment: Bore gauge or pin gauge; 3 readings 120 deg apart

measurement: bore ID at mid (10.75 in from foot)
action: Mid-bore typically widest; reaming pass evens out.
Top-of-bore matters acoustically — utaguchi is cut into this end.

measurement: wall thickness at hole 4 station (12.95 in from foot)
Ro fundamental (no holes covered? all holes covered)
environment: Korg OT-120; player TK; 68F, 45% RH; mic 6 in
action: File utaguchi or trim foot to bring fundamental within range.

environment: Tuner; player TK; environment per stage 3
action: File hole open in 0.5 mm increments. Never enlarge with drill.
Hole 3 typically needs the most filing.
Drilled on back; verify clean overblow before file-open.
Octave error > 25 cents = bore taper / utaguchi geometry issue. Reshape, do not tone-hole-tune.

environment: Tuner; player TK; same time of day
action: Check pitch stability after oil cure + carnauba wax. If > 5 cents drift, reapply oil and re-cure.
